security_controls.name: daily offline backups
security_controls.description: Regular offline backups that allow restoration of data after encryption or destruction events.

security_controls.name: endpoint protection platform
security_controls.description: Endpoint protection capable of detecting and blocking malicious binaries and suspicious execution behavior.

security_controls.name: operating system and application patching
security_controls.description: Timely patching of systems and applications to remove known vulnerabilities commonly used by ransomware operators.

security_controls.name: secure email filtering
security_controls.description: Inbound email filtering that blocks suspicious senders, malicious attachments, and known phishing links.

security_controls.name: multi-factor authentication
security_controls.description: An additional authentication factor that reduces the value of stolen passwords in account compromise scenarios.

security_controls.name: security awareness training
security_controls.description: User training focused on recognizing phishing attempts and suspicious credential requests.

security_controls.name: restrictive firewall rules
security_controls.description: Network restrictions that limit administrative access to approved hosts or management networks only.

security_controls.name: privileged access management policy
security_controls.description: Privileged account controls enforcing strong administrator credentials and controlled use of privileged sessions.

security_controls.name: badge-controlled office access
security_controls.description: Physical access restrictions that reduce the probability that unauthorized persons can directly reach the workstation.

security_controls.name: automatic screen lock
security_controls.description: Automatic workstation locking after inactivity, reducing the time window in which an unattended workstation can be abused.

security_controls.name: full-disk encryption
security_controls.description: Encryption of local workstation storage so that stolen or accessed devices do not directly expose stored files.

security_controls.name: access logging and periodic audit
security_controls.description: Logging and review of access events in order to detect and deter unauthorized access to shared files.

security_controls.name: least-privilege access control
security_controls.description: Review and reduction of shared-folder permissions according to the least-privilege principle, so that users retain only the access strictly necessary for their role.

security_controls.name: manual recovery procedure
security_controls.description: Documented recovery steps that allow operators to restore service more quickly after controller failure.

security_controls.name: redundant standby controller
security_controls.description: A backup controller that can take over if the primary controller fails, reducing both outage probability and outage severity.

security_controls.name: backup encryption
security_controls.description: Encryption of backup media so that unauthorized access to the copies does not directly expose their contents.
